FaqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
FaqPage.subtitle: Answers below are sample copy for demonstration.
FaqPage.q1: If I book online, is the appointment confirmed immediately?
FaqPage.a1: Requests are reviewed by staff before confirmation — a real system would follow up with you.
FaqPage.q2: How do I reschedule or cancel?
FaqPage.a2: Sample: notify at least 24 hours in advance via LINE or by calling the branch.
FaqPage.a3: Sample: some team members can communicate in English — please mention it when booking.
FaqPage.q4: Does booking count as a diagnosis?
FaqPage.a4: No — it’s only an initial appointment request.

hero.title: Smile with confidence — modern technology
hero.body: Plan your smile with digital smile design, step-by-step assessments, and a team focused on safety — all content on this page is for demonstration only.
hero.photoDisclaimer: Not the real Clinic Demo location — illustration only.
